query: Tour of the Gila gran fondo cycling Silver City

videos.title: Tour of the Gila - Stage 1
videos.description: The Wild West backdrop of the Gila landscape never fails to disappoint. Today's Race Day captures the grit and determination of the start of what promises to be a fantastic week in Silver City, and to top it all off, we ended the day with three riders in the top 15. Follow us on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and our website to keep up-to-date during the week.

videos.title: 2017 Gila Monster Grand Fondo - Silver City, NM
Tour of the Gila Sunday Road Race Cat 4 Men
videos.description: This video runs until my GoPro runs out of batteries.  It misses the final climb of the race known as the "Gila Monster",

videos.title: Tour of the Gila 2018 Stage Five
videos.description:
Sometimes things don’t go to plan. The team laid all their cards on the table today in an attempt to get Alex Evans back onto the podium in the U23 competition. Some bad luck with mechanicals put the team on the back foot with 50km to go. Angus Lyons threw down the hammer to assist Alex back to the front of the race, but it was not meant to be. 

This is our final video from Harry Wiles of @PeakCreate for our USA block of racing. It has been a fantastic week here in Silver City for the 32nd Tour of the Gila. We have loved the support throughout the past two weeks. 

As some of you may know, the cycling community lost one of their own after an accident at this race last year. Chad Young was a much loved cyclist and rider with the Hagens Berman Axeon Team. In honour of Chad and as a way to celebrate his life, we ask that if you have enjoyed these videos you might considered donating to the Chad Young Foundation. More: https://cwyf.org

videos.title: Gila Monster Gran Fondo 2014 Part 1
videos.description: 70 mile race in Silver City, NM starting in Gough Park, out through the Mimbres valley, up through Lake Roberts and finishing in PA. Part 1 ends at the top of the Mimbres valley.
